The '''Radra system''' was some distance from major routes and close to the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] frontier. It contained the planet [[Radra IV]] and its two moons. [[JS-77B interstellar shuttle]]s were common sights in the Radra system. The Empire was rumored to be planning to restrict access to the system due to its mining on the planet Radra IV.

{{System-stub}}
